use_cases: Landing page main section showcasing product or service with prominent CTA
SaaS product introduction with feature highlights and conversion button
Portfolio or personal brand hero with call-to-action
Startup landing page with modern visual appeal
Product launch page with gradient background and engaging typography
ai_summary: Brijr Hero Modern is a contemporary landing page hero section component designed for SaaS and digital product websites. It features a clean, modern aesthetic with gradient backgrounds, glass-morphism effects, and minimalist typography. The component includes a headline, subtext, and call-to-action button, optimized for both desktop and mobile platforms with hover interactions on interactive elements.
